data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Character limits with auto-splitting', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or testing of this feature. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to character limits indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of character limits with auto-splitting functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the character limits and auto-splitting functionality.
